blogs.title: Distill — Clear explanations of machine learning
blogs.author: Distill.pub
blogs.description: Beautifully interactive deep-dives into ML concepts — attention, optimization, GNNs, RL. Best when you want to truly understand something visually.

blogs.title: Towards Data Science — Machine Learning
blogs.author: Various authors
blogs.description: The biggest ML publication on Medium. Practical tutorials, end-to-end projects, and career write-ups updated daily.

blogs.title: Sebastian Raschka — Ahead of AI
blogs.author: Sebastian Raschka
blogs.description: Author of 'Build a Large Language Model (From Scratch)'. Deep, paper-grounded explainers on LLMs, fine-tuning, and ML research trends.

blogs.title: Lilian Weng's Log
blogs.author: Lilian Weng (OpenAI)
blogs.description: Long-form survey posts that have become canonical references — attention, prompt engineering, agents, reward hacking.

blogs.title: Machine Learning Mastery
blogs.author: Jason Brownlee
blogs.description: Hands-on tutorials with runnable code. Great for going from 'I read about it' to 'I built it' in scikit-learn, Keras, and PyTorch.

blogs.title: The Illustrated Transformer
blogs.author: Jay Alammar
blogs.description: If you only read one post on transformers, read this one. Illustrated explanations of BERT, GPT, attention, and embeddings.

blogs.title: Andrej Karpathy's blog
blogs.author: Andrej Karpathy
blogs.description: Classics like 'A Recipe for Training Neural Networks' and 'The Unreasonable Effectiveness of RNNs'. Few posts, all gold.

blogs.title: Hugging Face Blog
blogs.author: Hugging Face team
blogs.description: Walkthroughs of new open models, fine-tuning recipes, RLHF, quantization, and inference tricks — from the people shipping them.

blogs.title: Chip Huyen — Designing Machine Learning Systems
blogs.author: Chip Huyen
blogs.description: ML systems, production GenAI, RAG, agents, and the gap between research and reality. A must-read for ML/AI engineers.

blogs.title: Anthropic Research
blogs.author: Anthropic
blogs.description: Frontier LLM research — interpretability, alignment, constitutional AI, agent capabilities. Heavier reading but the source of record.

blogs.title: OpenAI Research
blogs.author: OpenAI
blogs.description: Papers and posts behind GPT, function calling, and reasoning models. Pair with the API documentation when shipping with them.

blogs.title: Towards Data Science
blogs.author: Various authors
blogs.description: The default Medium publication for data science. Filter by 'Editor's Picks' to avoid the noise.

blogs.title: KDnuggets
blogs.author: Various authors
blogs.description: One of the oldest data-science publications. Weekly digests, cheat sheets, and career advice for analysts and scientists.

blogs.title: Stitch Fix Algorithms
blogs.author: Stitch Fix team
blogs.description: Industrial DS done right — experimentation, causal inference, recommendations. Read for how DS actually shows up at a real company.

blogs.title: Variance Explained
blogs.author: David Robinson
blogs.description: Tidy-data thinking, R + Python deep dives, and statistical reasoning by a former DataCamp / Heap chief data scientist.

blogs.title: Eugene Yan
blogs.author: Eugene Yan
blogs.description: Practical essays on ML systems, recommender systems, applied LLMs, and how senior ICs work. Perennially shared on Twitter for a reason.

blogs.title: Made With ML
blogs.author: Goku Mohandas
blogs.description: A full free curriculum on going from notebook to production — pipelines, monitoring, CI/CD for ML, and testing.

blogs.title: Neptune.ai Blog
blogs.author: Neptune team
blogs.description: Tool-agnostic write-ups on experiment tracking, model registries, drift detection, and choosing infra for ML teams.

blogs.title: Weights & Biases — Fully Connected
blogs.author: W&B team
blogs.description: Reports, interviews, and reproducible notebooks. Strong on training-pipeline best practices and evaluation.

blogs.title: MLOps Community Blog
blogs.author: MLOps Community
blogs.description: Practitioner voices on real MLOps problems — vector stores, feature stores, eval, and on-call for ML systems.

blogs.title: Netflix Tech Blog
blogs.author: Netflix engineering
blogs.description: How Netflix builds personalization, A/B testing platforms, and ML infra at scale. Required reading for senior DS/ML candidates.

blogs.title: Uber Engineering
blogs.author: Uber engineering
blogs.description: Michelangelo (their ML platform), forecasting, geospatial ML, and large-scale data engineering.

blogs.title: Airbnb Engineering & Data Science
blogs.author: Airbnb engineering
blogs.description: Search ranking, pricing models, experimentation, and how Airbnb structures its DS function. Excellent for interview prep.

blogs.title: Google Research Blog
blogs.author: Google Research
blogs.description: The latest from Google's research arm — Gemini, robotics, health AI, responsible AI.

blogs.title: Meta AI Blog
blogs.author: Meta AI
blogs.description: Llama releases, recommender systems, multimodal models, and infrastructure posts from FAIR.

blogs.title: Spotify Engineering
blogs.author: Spotify engineering
blogs.description: Music recommendations, large-scale embeddings, audio ML, and the ML platform behind Discover Weekly.

blogs.title: Andrew Gelman — Statistical Modeling
blogs.author: Andrew Gelman
blogs.description: Bayesian thinking, causal inference, and merciless critique of bad statistics in published papers. Sharpens how you reason about data.

blogs.title: Cross Validated — Most Voted
blogs.author: Community
blogs.description: Top-voted Q&A on statistics and ML. The highest-voted answers are often a faster path to understanding than textbooks.

blogs.title: The Gradient
blogs.author: Various authors
blogs.description: Long-form essays surveying AI research areas — accessible enough to be readable, deep enough to be useful.

blogs.title: AI Snake Oil
blogs.author: Arvind Narayanan, Sayash Kapoor
blogs.description: Princeton researchers cutting through AI hype. Read before believing the next viral benchmark claim.

newsletters.title: The Batch — DeepLearning.AI
newsletters.description: Weekly AI news roundup curated by Andrew Ng's team. Best 5-minute read each week to stay current.

newsletters.title: Import AI
newsletters.description: Jack Clark's weekly newsletter on AI research and policy. Influential among practitioners.

newsletters.title: Data Elixir
newsletters.description: Curated data science links — tutorials, tools, and notable papers — delivered weekly.

newsletters.title: TLDR AI
newsletters.description: Daily 5-minute AI digest. Good signal-to-noise for staying on top of releases without doomscrolling.

newsletters.title: Ben's Bites
newsletters.description: Daily GenAI / LLM newsletter with new tools, releases, and tutorials. Light reading, useful breadth.
